# 📲  Mobile push messages = increased website traffic!

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-01-07 18:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 453

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Are you struggling to get your website visitors to come back and
see what's new?

Many of our users have expressed frustration in getting their
audience to see their fresh content, especially when something
new is published.

They know that constantly updating their site and creating new
content is key, but they were missing a way to instantly alert
their audience of these updates.

I have the perfect solution: PushEngage 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.sRDamM8o0bwimaYJCRy_stJG4Q3ci4XXtRgFJET3dVg ).

With PushEngage, you can instantly send mobile push notifications
to your subscribers' phones every time you publish a new blog
post, announce a sale, or have a special event—all directly from
your WordPress website.

This is a game-changer for driving traffic back to your site and
keeping your audience engaged.

And the best part is, they offer a completely FREE plan!

Here's why PushEngage is a powerful tool for keeping your
visitors informed:

* Instant Notifications: Send immediate alerts to your users'
phones when you publish new content.
* Mobile App Reach: Reach your audience directly on their Android
and iOS devices.
* Increased Traffic: Drive more visitors back to your WordPress
website with targeted messages.
* Timely Announcements: Notify users about sales, events, and
other important updates, ensuring they don't miss out.
* Easy to Use: Simple setup and integration with WordPress.

👉 Get started today with PushEngage's FREE plan 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.sRDamM8o0bwimaYJCRy_stJG4Q3ci4XXtRgFJET3dVg ) and send up to 30 campaigns a month
to 200 subscribers! Start driving traffic back to your website
and re-engaging with your audience.

Talk soon,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
